The samples arrived late. This is a real problem for the team.

Hi Sarah, this is Fernando. We have an issue with the study. The samples arrived late, and this is a real problem for the team. The cause is a delay at customs. I think we should meet today to find a solution. We need to decide on the next steps. Please call me back. Thank you.
